chapter_title.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْعَبْدِ إِذَا تَزَوَّجَ بِإِذْنِ مَوْلَاهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – Divorce of the slave when he married by the permission of his master

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَأْذَنُ لِعَبْدِهِ أَنْ يَتَزَوَّجَ الْحُرَّةَ أَوْ أَمَةَ قَوْمٍ الطَّلَاقُ إِلَى السَّيِّدِ أَوْ إِلَى الْعَبْدِ قَالَ الطَّلَاقُ إِلَى الْعَبْدِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad, from Ahmad, from Ibn Mahboub, from Jameel Bin Salih, from Abu Baseer who said,

‘I asked Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> about the man who permits his slave that he marries the free woman, or a slave girl, would the divorced be fixed to the master or to the slave?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The divorce is up to the slave’.
